name: DeepSeek LLM
tagline: DeepSeek's first general LLM: dense 7B and 67B Base and Chat models; foundation for the later V-series.
metaDescription: DeepSeek LLM (DeepSeek), released 2023-11-29 — part of the DeepSeek LLM line. DeepSeek's first general LLM: dense 7B and 67B Base and Chat models; foundation f…
overview: DeepSeek LLM is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek LLM line. Released 2023-11-29. The original general-purpose dense LLM line (pre-MoE), now legacy and superseded by the V-series.
What's notable in this version: DeepSeek's first general LLM: dense 7B and 67B Base and Chat models; foundation for the later V-series.
